main.description: An event organized into a slot. The authoring DID is the organizer. An event record is also the slot-claim signal: publishing this record asks the indexer to transition the referenced slot to claimed (or, for review-policy venues, to pending).

slot.description: AT-URI of the app.hekate.slot this event claims. The slot's authoring DID is the venue owner; the event's authoring DID is the organizer (these MUST be different for a valid claim, except in self-hosted-venue cases).

visibility.description: public: discoverable by indexers and listed in venue/search results. unlisted: indexed only when the AT-URI is known. Note: ATProto records are inherently public; this flag is an indexer hint, not an access-control mechanism.

capacityCap.description: Optional organizer-imposed RSVP cap; absent means use the venue's capacity.

externalUrl.description: Optional link to external event details (ticketing, agenda, etc.).
